title: Savory Velvety Chinese Vegetable Stir-fry
description: A flavorful and velvety weeknight dish from Fuzhou cuisine featuring a blend of vegetables and a touch of cooking wine for added depth.

ingredients.name: green onion
ingredients.amount: 3 green onions, finely chopped (white and green parts)

ingredients.name: Sichuan peppercorns
ingredients.amount: 5-6 small, crushed lightly with a mortar and pestle

instructions: Heat sesame oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat. Add Sichuan peppercorns, stir for about 30 seconds until fragrant.
Add celery and bok choy to the hot oil, stirring occasionally until vegetables start to soften, about 5 minutes.
Increase heat to high, add red bell peppers and green onions. Stir-fry until slightly charred around edges, about 2-3 minutes more.
Pour in cooking wine, fish sauce, and a sprinkle of salt. Stir quickly to combine all ingredients evenly.
